fixes.origin:
command = f"file {asset_path} >/dev/null && {post_hook}"
result = subprocess.run(
    command,
    shell=True,
    capture_output=True,
    text=True,
)
fixes.replacement:
result = subprocess.run(
    ["file", str(asset_path)],
    stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,
    stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
    text=True,
)
